item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 23h PODCAST TOPICS Intro: US Masters Chat (0-3mins) Gold Dancer (3-15mi
item.description: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 23h PODCAST TOPICS Intro: US Masters Chat (0-3mins) Gold Dancer (3-15mins) Grand National Review (15-25mins) Other Racing News in the Last Week (25-27mins) The Green Party & The Sun (27-33mins) Barrier Trials Update: NH Racing Too (33-41mins) Change At The Tote (41-42mins) Mark Mostrar más Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 23h Today's @AKBets podcast - Hedge Funds - should now be live on Youtube, Apple and Spotify . 1 1 1 mil

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 22h BHA are up against it on affordability checks but they can make some
item.description: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 22h BHA are up against it on affordability checks but they can make some quick wins by beefing up their Stewards Reports on the day (and vigorously following up anything missed there) & asking more Qs of some rides. Also, doing more on these private NH (details in pod) & Flat trials Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 23h Today's @AKBets podcast - Hedge Funds - should now be live on Youtube, Apple and Spotify . 2 1 3 mil

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 11min Grade 1-winning trainer Micky Hammond has been given a six-month ban, suspended for 12 m
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 11min Grade 1-winning trainer Micky Hammond has been given a six-month ban, suspended for 12 months, and hit with an £8,000 fine after three of his runners tested positive for a banned raceday substance in the space of a month De racingpost.com 1 4 6 2 mil
